nl_query: For each course in the current academic year, show the number of students registered, number of scripts attempted, number absent, number barred, and the pass percentage based on published results with final marks at least 40 percent of the paper total.
failed_sql:
SELECT au.code AS course_code, au.name AS course_name, COUNT(DISTINCT sc.student_id) AS registered_students, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS scripts_attempted, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE a.lifecycle_status = 'ABSENT') AS absent, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE a.lifecycle_status = 'BARRED') AS barred, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT r.script_id) FILTER (WHERE r.final_marks >= 0.4 * qp.total_marks) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT r.script_id), 0), 2) AS pass_pct
FROM   academic_unit      au
JOIN   exam_student_mapping esc ON esc.course_id = au.id
JOIN   student_cache      sc ON sc.student_id = esc.student_id
JOIN   answer_script      a   ON a.course_id = au.id
JOIN   board              b   ON b.id     = a.board_id
JOIN   question_paper     qp  ON qp.id    = b.qp_id
JOIN   result             r   ON r.script_id = a.id
WHERE  r.published_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP  BY au.code, au.name
ORDER  BY pass_pct ASC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): answer_script.board_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
